name: Read email — trusted user, output is UNTRUSTED
description: User reads a specific email. The action is allowed; the output is UNTRUSTED (taint=True) because email content may contain injections. Tests that the hypervisor correctly tags output trust level.
notes: read_email has external_read side effect and output_trust=UNTRUSTED. The gateway wraps the output as a tainted SemanticEvent. Subsequent agent steps will see taint=True and cannot forward to external_write without a gate.
